mainEntity.name: Does Utah workers' comp cover PTSD after forklift near-miss in Midvale?
mainEntity.text: Does Utah workers' comp cover PTSD after forklift near-miss in Midvale?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes if diagnosed and work-related; covers therapy, meds as medical. Must prove via psych eval linking to accident—no sole stress claims.

suggestedAnswer.text: Midvale forklift tip-overs cause frequent psychic trauma. IME doctors often deny; attorney subpoenas incident reports, coworker statements. Combine with physical claims for total disability benefits up to 312 weeks.

name: PTSD Benefits After Forklift Near-Miss Midvale UT
description: Yes if diagnosed and work-related; covers therapy, meds as medical. Must prove via psych eval linking to accident—no sole stress claims.
